answer: MBA ki fees ₹90,000 per year hai

question: admission kab start hote hai
answer: Admission June se start hote hain

question: admission process kya hai
answer: Admission online form fill karke aur documents verify karke hota hai

question: eligibility kya hai bca ke liye
answer: BCA ke liye 12th pass hona zaroori hai

question: eligibility kya hai btech ke liye
answer: B.Tech ke liye PCM ke saath 12th pass hona zaroori hai

question: courses kaun kaun se hai
answer: College me BCA, BBA, B.Tech, MCA, MBA courses available hain

question: bca duration kya hai
answer: BCA course 3 saal ka hota hai

question: btech duration kya hai
answer: B.Tech course 4 saal ka hota hai

question: mba duration kya hai
answer: MBA course 2 saal ka hota hai

question: hostel facility hai kya
answer: Haan, boys aur girls dono ke liye hostel available hai

answer: Hostel fees ₹30,000 per year hai

answer: Haan, mess facility available hai

answer: Haan, college me placement support diya jata hai

answer: Average package ₹3-5 LPA hota hai

answer: TCS, Infosys, Wipro jaise companies visit karti hain

answer: Haan, well-equipped library available hai

answer: Haan, indoor aur outdoor sports facilities available hain

answer: Haan, campus me free WiFi available hai

answer: College Punjab me located hai

answer: Minimum 75% attendance required hai

answer: Result exams ke 1-2 mahine baad aata hai
